intended_use: SubtleMR is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement in MRI images. It can be used to reduce image noise for head, spine, neck, abdomen, pelvis, prostate, breast and musculo
intended_use_full: SubtleMR is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement in MRI images. It can be used to reduce image noise for head, spine, neck, abdomen, pelvis, prostate, breast and musculoskeletal MRI, or increase image sharpness for head MRI.
other_metrics: Noise reduction test: signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) improved by ≥5% on average; visibility of small structures changed by ≤0.5 Likert scale points on average. Sharpness enhancement test: anatomic structure thickness and boundary sharpness improved in ≥90% of test datasets.
